content: The iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine (originally designed for output refinement) can be adapted to ground multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-improvement system where low-level output refinement reinforces high-perspective reflective reasoning, and vice versa. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning, making it easy to deploy for existing open-source LLMs.
